delta_since_last_push.summary: Massive expansion: 3 new top-level folders (HCI, Higgins Coordinates, Hs_Direct), 3 new experiment folders (LAB01, MC4, STD), 8 new projection generators, EDI control gate, Poincaré disc connection, Compositional Navigation Tensor, complete projection/cinema standard. CNT precision audit: 10 precision experiments (P01-P10), engine refined to IEEE 754 floor (arccos→atan2, Helmert basis, condition number diagnostic). Pipeline grows from 18 to 26 files. Interactive tools grow from 9 to 10. Experiment folders grow from 29 to 30.
